author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Both bugs fixed: 1) PTX module cache with LazyLock HashMap — compile once, nanosecond lookups forever. All 8 kernel sites updated (kernels.rs, conv.rs, flash_attention.rs). 2) Softplus/ELU/Mish now differentiable with proper GradFn backward. 118 GPU tests, all passing. Numerical gradient checks verify correctness.
